## 2025-02-19 - [Prevent XSS in DescriptionPreview]
**Vulnerability:** XSS vulnerability in `src/components/upload/DescriptionPreview.tsx` caused by direct use of `dangerouslySetInnerHTML` to render HTML provided by backend or converted from BBCode without sanitization.
**Learning:** Even though HTML might be generated by the backend or a conversion function, it should never be implicitly trusted in the frontend when injected via `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`. Hydration mismatches and SSR vulnerabilities could occur if the proper sanitization is not done.
**Prevention:** Use `isomorphic-dompurify` to sanitize HTML during both Server-Side Rendering (SSR) and Client-Side rendering. Ensure HTML strings are passed to `DOMPurify.sanitize()` before being placed into `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`.
